results.title: US completes 11th night of strikes on Iran; Pentagon says war costs $37.5B, seeks $90B more
results.description: Iranian state media reported US air strikes across multiple provinces, hitting Kabudarahang County in Hamadan province in west-central Iran.

results.title: Facial paralysis: How gentle electroacupuncture may boost nerve repair - TheHealthSite
results.description: Facial paralysis: How gentle electroacupuncture may boost nerve repair TheHealthSite Comparison of FDIP and FDIS scores before and after treatment of patients with peripheral facial paralysis in the 3 groups (x̄ ± s). EurekAlert! Gentle electroacupuncture effectively promotes nerve repair in facial paralysis News-Medical
